stories.title: Create drawGenericShape utility matching Java GenericShape rendering
acceptanceCriteria: Draws body rect with 0.05 insets on left/right (matching Java)
Draws input pin labels at x=0.2 (regular) and x=0.55 (clock) with LEFTCENTER
Draws output pin labels at x=width-0.2 with RIGHTCENTER
Draws clock triangles at (0.05, y+0.35)->(0.4, y)->(0.05, y-0.35)
Draws component name at (width/2, maxY-0.3) with CENTERTOP

stories.title: Update all GenericShape components to use correct rendering
acceptanceCriteria: All ~40 GenericShape components draw matching Java text/body
Zero missing/extra text in test results
+0.1 width delta eliminated for all components

stories.title: Fix FET pin positions
acceptanceCriteria: Zero pin position mismatches in test

stories.title: All shape-render-audit tests pass
acceptanceCriteria: npx vitest run shape-render-audit.test.ts exits with 0 failures
